# Acumen HSC

> HSC Business Studies tutoring in Sydney, Australia. Small-group classes capped at 6 students, taught by Band 6 graduates from UNSW, USYD, UTS, and Macquarie. Serving Year 11 and Year 12 students across Sydney CBD and online.

URL: https://acumenhsc.com.au

## What we offer

- Weekly 1-hour small-group lessons (max 6 students)
- Live essay marking returned within 48 hours, marked against NESA criteria
- 24-hour question line: tutors respond within 24 hours, every day
- Band 6 notes written by a 99.95 ATAR Business Studies graduate
- Full past-paper bank: every Section I–IV question from 2010–2025, indexed by syllabus dot point
- Full mock exam with personalised improvement report before each major exam

## Pricing

- Casual: $110 per 1-hour session (inc. GST)
- Term enrolment: $950 per school term (~10 sessions, inc. GST)
- First lesson free, no credit card required

## Syllabus topics covered

The HSC Business Studies course has four topics:
1. Operations — the highest-probability Section III essay topic (appeared 2022, 2023, 2024)
2. Marketing — Section II allocates 8–10 marks to marketing most years
3. Finance — ratio analysis (GPM, NPM, ROE, current ratio, gearing) tested across all sections
4. Human Resources — Section III was an HR case study in 2024

## Location and contact

- Sydney CBD, NSW, Australia (in-person and online)
- Phone: +61 470 665 141
- Website: https://acumenhsc.com.au

## Free resources

- Practice quiz bank with real HSC questions from 2022–2025
- URL: https://acumenhsc.com.au/practice

## Qualifications

All tutors are Band 6 HSC Business Studies graduates who scored in the top band on the actual NESA exam.
